name: Ham Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese with the egg yolk, baking powder, and a dash of salt in a bowl. Mix until blended and smooth.
2. Cut 4 small rounds from each slice of bread using a biscuit cutter or small glass.
3. Spread each round lightly with mayonnaise.
4. Spread each round with a thin layer of deviled ham.
5. Spoon the cheese mixture over the ham.
6. Sprinkle with paprika.
This dish can be prepared ahead and frozen if desired. To serve, place in a moderately hot oven (375°F) for 12-15 minutes, or until puffed and browned. Serve immediately. Makes 45 appetizers.
